sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65505" key="megalourge/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεγᾰλουργέω</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεγᾰλο-γής</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεγᾰλο-γία</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεγᾰλο-γικός</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεγᾰλο-γός</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">μεγαλοεργ</itype>-.</entryFree>
